name: Anteris Technologies Global Corp.
business: The Company is engaged in the business of structural heart therapeutics. The Company's Class III device is awaiting FDA approval. The Company collaborates with partners on manufacturing, co-development, and co-commercialization of its products.

exposures.sentence: the Company and Medtronic agree to engage in non-exclusive good faith discussions regarding potential collaboration opportunities with respect to manufacturing, co-development and co-commercialization of the Company's products

catalysts.event: FDA approval of Class III device
catalysts.sentence: the U.S. Food and Drug Administration approves the Company's Class III device
